add.requirement_reference: story_summary.json: business_logic_rules - Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link)
add.description: Add explicit handling and documentation for empty cart state, including UI redirection logic to 'continue shopping' link.
add.reason: LLD does not mention UI redirection for empty cart state, which is a business logic requirement in the story.

add.requirement_reference: story_summary.json: api_contracts_required - POST /api/v1/cart/items (Add product, default quantity: 1)
add.description: Document default quantity behavior for POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint, ensuring that adding a product defaults to quantity 1 if not specified.
add.reason: LLD does not specify default quantity behavior for adding items to cart, which is required by the story.

add.requirement_reference: story_summary.json: data_model_impact - CartItem (Entity containing Product Reference, Quantity, and current Price Snapshot)
add.description: Add explicit documentation for storing current price snapshot in CartItem entity.
add.reason: LLD Cart Items table does not mention storing price snapshot, which is required for accurate cart calculations and is specified in the story.

modify.current_state: PUT /api/v1/cart/items/{itemId} endpoint allows updating quantity but does not specify automatic recalculation of subtotal and total.
modify.required_change: Update API documentation to specify that any quantity mutation triggers automatic recalculation of subtotal and cart total.
modify.reason: Story requires automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon quantity mutation, but LLD does not specify this behavior.

modify.current_state: CartService class diagram and responsibilities do not mention UI redirection for empty cart state.
modify.required_change: Add logic and documentation for empty cart state triggering UI redirection to 'continue shopping' link.
modify.reason: Story specifies this business logic, but LLD omits it.
